definition_long: Observable environmental attribute where Warm vs cool white appearance (CCT) and perceived coziness / activation (Cajochen et al., 2005 is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Daylight presence, sky view, and view-to-outside content is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Lighting control cues: dimmers, blinds, task lights is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Clutter / disorder: object density, occlusion, surface coverage is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Cleanliness / maintenance: stains, damage, wear is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Visible vegetation quantity, proximity, and distribution is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Window view content: greenery, sky, water vs built-up is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Density / crowding proxies: chairs per area, people present, queueing lines is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Surveillance cues: cameras, exposed workstations, panoramic visibility is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where Privacy cues: partitions, doors, curtains is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.

Observable environmental attribute where User controls visible and accessible: dimmers, blinds, thermostats is present. This is a computed or measured metric from environmental, spatial, or visual data; use only when the metric is calculated for the scene. Do not guess the value from appearance.
